channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 5 AI pair tools that actually improved our sprints
item.description: Cut review comments 69% and delivery time 114× with AI pair programming — GitHub Copilot Workspace 1.55 vs Cursor vs Amazon Q vs Zed vs Codeium benchmarked over 15 real tickets

item.title: JSON mode’s silent failures exposed
item.description: Cut LLM output failures 98% with a 3-layer protocol: schema-first design, text envelope, and repair pipeline — all using Pydantic 2.7 and Redis 7.2 in 2026 workflows.

item.title: AI agents: why devtools now sell like SaaS in 2026
item.description: Sentinel cut MTTR 91% by shifting from developer-first to platform-first sales in 2026 — with real Go 1.22 and Node 20 LTS stacks, SOC 2 Type I, and Jira OAuth 2.0 integrations used in production. Learn the exact pivot that turned 3 paid conversions into 4 enterprise deals at $52k ARR.

item.title: Flag your AI rollouts in 2026
item.description: Cut AI rollback time 99% with LaunchDarkly 5.17 — flag evaluation latency, GDPR compliance, and Prometheus dashboards inside.

item.title: Synchronous vs async tool calls: latency traps at 1000
item.description: Async tool calls cut API latency 7–10x at 1000 RPS — connection pool tuning, timeout gotchas, and the async vs sync benchmark that changed our Jakarta and Dublin clusters

item.title: Ditch Pinecone, keep pgvector
item.description: Cut Pinecone costs 90% with pgvector — real benchmarks, $12k savings, and the Postgres-only setup that beat managed services

item.title: AI wrappers failed in 2026: what survived
item.description: Cut AI wrapper costs 70% in 2026 by wrapping workflows, not models. See the 3 wrappers that survived and the 5 that failed with concrete numbers, benchmarks, and code.

item.title: 2026 salary hacks: Prove AI didn’t steal your value
item.description: Get 5.5 % higher raises in 2026 by translating AI-augmented work into business metrics — revenue per engineer, cost saved, displacement risk, and senior recognition index.

item.title: Slay CI false positives with smart scanning
item.description: Reduce CI security false positives 81% by scanning only the runtime artifact — Trivy 0.51, Snyk 1.1320, and GitHub Actions setup with real numbers.

item.title: Database branching: 3 Neon mistakes that cost me weeks
item.description: Save 80% on database costs with cloud branching — Neon and PlanetScale CLI timeout fixes, connection string mistakes, and the 3 errors that break local workflows in 2026

item.title: Self-healing pipelines: GitHub Actions vs Argo
item.description: Cut self-healing pipeline MTTR 60%: GitHub Actions vs Argo Workflows with concrete benchmarks, cost data, and rollback latency figures.

item.title: TLS 1.3 + post-quantum: what breaks at scale
item.description: P99 TLS latency drops 37% when post-quantum crypto targets only session tickets — not full handshakes. Real numbers from 50M requests, OpenSSL 3.0.13, and Nginx 1.25.3.

item.title: 2026: Why I Switched from Stripe to Paddle
item.description: Paddle beats Stripe on EU tax compliance and dunning — saving 23 errors/month and 96 hours/year in reconciliation time for €3.1M ARR SaaS. Compare fees, exit costs, and real production numbers.

item.title: AI stole system design
item.description: Detect AI-generated system designs in 2026 interviews — 3 concrete red flags, a live debugging fix, and the exact Terraform command to audit Terraform pasted from Copilot.

item.title: Unlearn these AI workflow rules in 2026
item.description: AI workflows fail when teams treat AI like a tool instead of a collaborator — blast radius, confidence scores, and rollback triggers that actually work in 2026.

item.title: Build a portfolio that beats the AI clone pile
item.description: Portfolio projects with AI wrappers get ignored in 2026 — here’s how we built a boring expense tracker that hiring leads actually reviewed, with 4% error rate on 2G and $2.30/month infra cost.

item.title: Own the AI-changed pull request
item.description: Cut review time 71% and defects 79% by using AI as a pre-review partner — not a replacement — with concrete configs, costs, and metrics from a 2026 production rollout.

item.title: AI finds vulns: what defenders miss
item.description: Reduce AI scanner noise 40% in one step — precision vs recall, thresholds, and the concrete config you can apply today.

item.title: Stop async Python surprises before they burn you
item.description: Cut async Python memory 38% and p99 latency 14ms with trio — connection pool leaks, nursery scopes, and the AWS Lambda gotcha most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: MCP servers 2026: why your agent keeps crashing
item.description: Reduce MCP server crashes 90% with error handling, memory limits, and sandbox profiles in 2026 — fixes for Node 20 LTS and Python 3.11 MCP SDKs.
